activities.instructions: Select both mixed conditionals that correctly express the facts.
activities.prompt: I went to bed late. As a result, I am tired now.

options.text: If I had gone to bed earlier, I wouldn't be tired now.
If I went to bed earlier, I wouldn't have been tired now.
I wouldn't be so tired now if I hadn't stayed up late.
If I would sleep earlier, I wasn't tired now.

activities.explanation: Ambas respuestas conectan una causa pasada irreal con el estado presente de cansancio.

activities.instructions: Select both mixed conditionals that correctly express the facts.
activities.prompt: Marta did not accept the scholarship. She is not in Canada now.

options.text: Marta would be in Canada now if she had accepted the scholarship.
If Marta had accepted it, she might be studying in Canada now.
Marta would have been in Canada now if she accepted it.
If Marta would accept it, she had been in Canada now.

activities.explanation: La decisión pertenece al pasado y la ubicación o actividad imaginada pertenece al presente.

activities.instructions: Select both mixed conditionals that correctly express the facts.

If Leo had been patient now, he wouldn't send it yesterday.
Leo wouldn't have sent it if he would be patient.

If we would check it, we hadn't been lost now.

activities.instructions: Select both mixed conditionals that correctly express the facts.
